hero_desc: We are with you at every stage from design to assembly. Our expert team realizes your projects with light steel framing systems.
services_desc: Professional support at every stage of light steel framing systems.
svc1_desc: Exterior and interior wall steel framing, load-bearing profile installation, high-strength connection systems.
svc2_desc: DXF-based digital quantity surveying, material list extraction, cost analysis and quotation services.
svc3_desc: Boardex exterior cladding, OSB sheeting, drywall interior lining, moisture-resistant drywall for wet areas.
svc4_desc: Steel roof truss design and installation, trapezoidal sheet, sandwich panel, and tile cladding options.
svc5_desc: Rock wool and glass wool insulation, vapour barrier, energy efficiency solutions.
svc6_desc: Structural analysis and technical reporting compliant with TBDY 2018 and 2026 regulations.
svc7_title: Light Steel Walls in Concrete Buildings
svc7_desc: Factory-made light steel wall panels instead of brick on a reinforced concrete frame — a lighter, fast-to-install, earthquake-resistant hybrid solution.
packages_desc: Solutions for projects of every scale. Contact us for a detailed quote.
pkg1_desc: Foundation, steel frame and installation. Rough construction handover.
pkg2_desc: Rough structure + facade + insulation. Exterior fully complete handover.
pkg3_desc: Structural analysis, production, assembly and interior completion. Move-in ready handover.
projects_desc: Selected projects built with light steel framing systems.
blog_desc: Expert content from our team on light steel systems, structural analysis and the 2026 regulation.
blog1_title: 2026 Light Steel Building Regulation: Everything You Need to Know
blog1_desc: What does the regulation in Official Gazette No. 33256 bring? A comprehensive guide on profile requirements, seismic design and TBDY 2018 integration.
blog2_title: Is a Light Steel House Earthquake-Resistant? Engineer's Answer
blog2_desc: TBDY 2018, OSB shear wall system and real earthquake performance. Scientific comparison with reinforced concrete and soil class guide.
blog3_title: Light Steel Home Prices 2026: Realistic Cost Analysis
blog3_desc: Material, labour and installation costs per m². Comparison with reinforced concrete and when light steel is more economical.
about_desc: MefSteel was founded by two civil engineers with a clear purpose: to highlight ductility — light steel's greatest advantage in an earthquake — and to show that production in this industry can be carried out by engineers who understand the science behind it. Combining field experience with engineering know-how, we deliver your projects with quality materials, expert craftsmanship and on-time delivery.
contact_desc: Contact us to get a quote or information about your project.
footer_desc: Your trusted partner from design to installation in light steel framing systems.
adv_sub: Light steel building systems combine safety, speed and efficiency.
adv1_d: A lighter building attracts less seismic force. Every project is engineered to TBDY 2018/2026.
adv2_d: At 150–300 kg/m², far below reinforced concrete. Loads on the foundation and soil stay minimal.
adv3_d: Thanks to factory production and dry assembly — days and weeks instead of months of construction.
adv4_d: The galvanized steel frame doesn't burn or rust; it won't rot, mould or attract insects.
adv5_d: Strong thermal and acoustic insulation with integrated rock wool panels, for lower energy bills.
adv6_d: Founded by two civil engineers, MefSteel delivers a signed structural calculation for every project.
